title: Three ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz as Mideast war intensifies
shortDescription: After President Trump warned Iran from attempting to block the Strait of Hormuz, at least three ships have reported being struck by projectiles.

title: Georgia special election results: Who wins to replace MTG?
shortDescription: Georgia voters weigh in on who should replace Marjorie Taylor Greene.

title: Joe Rogan says 'people feel betrayed' by Trump's 'insane' Iran war
shortDescription: Trump appeared on Rogan’s popular podcast in 2024, and Rogan endorsed him on the day before the election.

title: Trump's dominance over GOP reaffirmed in Georgia special election
shortDescription: The president is looking to reassert MAGA dominance after squabbling with Marjorie Taylor Greene and others over affordability, Iran, and Epstein.

title: New Trump, Epstein statue pops up on National Mall
shortDescription: An installation depicted President Donald Trump and convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in a recreation of an iconic scene from the film "Titanic."

title: Trump administration's immigration policy censors speech, lawsuit says
shortDescription: The Coalition for Independent Technology Research called the policy a "flagrant violation of the First Amendment" in a March 9 lawsuit.

title: Rep. Tony Gonzales drops out of District 23 Congressional race
shortDescription: A Republican U.S. House representative from Texas said he is dropping out the midterms after admitting he had an affair.

title: Trump-endorsed Clay Fuller moves to Georgia runoff. Election updates.
shortDescription: Meanwhile, Democratic Rep. Bennie Thompson will likely return to Congress after staving off challengers in Mississippi's 2nd Congressional District.

title: White House redefines 'unconditional surrender'
shortDescription: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said military operations will end when "Iran is in a position of complete and unconditional surrender."

title: Can Trump run a war and a midterm campaign at the same time?
shortDescription: The push-and-pull between the Iran conflict and the November elections is contributing to mixed messages now and difficult choices ahead.

title: Is the Iran war ending soon? What Trump has said
shortDescription: Trump told reporters the war in Iran would end "soon," but said it would not end within a week. Attacks started Feb. 28. How long until it is over?

title: Voting tech company says it's being vindictively prosecuted by Trump DOJ
shortDescription: Voting technology company Smartmatic says it's being vindictively prosecuted for undermining a false Trump "mantra that the 2020 election was rigged."

title: Trump DOJ quietly restores gun rights, including to indicted lawmaker
shortDescription: The Trump administration plans to review as many as one million applications from convicted felons for gun rights relief.

title: Trump appoints Erika Kirk to Air Force Academy board
shortDescription: There are 16 seats on the board. Among them are Republican and Democratic lawmakers, as well as retired Air Force Col. Doug Nikolai.

title: Trump: Cuba may or may not be 'friendly takeover'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said the U.S. may or may not do a "friendly takeover" of Cuba.

title: From law school to TikTok news star | The Excerpt
shortDescription: TikTok news creator Aaron Parnas discusses his rise online, reaching Gen Z audiences and how social media is reshaping political news.

title: What election is taking place in Georgia today? Voters head to polls
shortDescription: Voters in Georgia's 14th congressional district are heading to the polls today to vote in a special election to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene.

title: Trump says soaring college football costs are hitting sports
shortDescription: U.S. President Donald Trump on Friday (March 6) said the soaring cost of paying for football at colleges was harming school sports in general and the problem would need to be addressed by legislation, adding he might sign an executive order about it.

title: 'Let them eat cake.' Kai Trump faces backlash for Erewhon video
shortDescription: Kai Trump generated controversy after she posted a YouTube video showing her shopping at an ultra-luxury grocery store in Santa Monica, California.

title: Iran operative convicted in 2024 plot to kill President Trump
shortDescription: Asif Merchant, 47, a Pakistani national trained by Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, was found guilty of murder for hire.
